message:
fix(membrane): bump fusion SIGNALS constant to 61 for sos_barrier severity slot

The sos_barrier controller was wired to severity[60] in the previous commit
but the fusion::SIGNALS compile-time constant was not updated to match. This
bumps SIGNALS from 60 to 61, satisfying the static assertion
(BASE_SEVERITY_LEN + META_SEVERITY_LEN == SIGNALS) with the new
META_SEVERITY_LEN of 36.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
